title: Short title
doc_html:
CHAPTER 15-B. LOCAL REGULATION OF FUEL

USED IN AGRICULTURAL MACHINERY AND FISHERY EQUIPMENT

§5091. Short title

            This Chapter shall be known and may be cited as the "Landscape and Fishery Equipment and Agricultural Fairness Act".

            Acts 2024, No. 195, §1.
doc_text:
CHAPTER 15-B.  LOCAL REGULATION OF FUEL
USED IN AGRICULTURAL MACHINERY AND FISHERY EQUIPMENT
§5091.  Short title
This Chapter shall be known and may be cited as the "Landscape and Fishery
Equipment and Agricultural Fairness Act".
Acts 2024, No. 195, §1.
